title: SOE Privatisation and Divestiture Programme 2024-2027
issuedBy: Ministry of Finance and National Planning
description: Directs IDC to develop and implement a structured privatisation and divestiture programme for non-strategic portfolio companies, targeting proceeds of ZMW 2.5 billion over the 2024-2027 period to reduce GRZ fiscal burden.
notes: IDC has identified 5 candidate companies for divestiture. Transaction advisors appointed for 2 companies. Political economy constraints delaying progress on 3 others.

title: Enhanced SOE Financial Reporting and Dividend Policy
issuedBy: Ministry of Finance and National Planning
description: Requires all IDC portfolio companies to submit quarterly financial performance reports to IDC within 30 days of quarter end. Establishes minimum dividend payout ratio of 30% of after-tax profit for profitable portfolio companies.
notes: All portfolio companies have submitted Q3 2024 reports on time. Dividend policy being implemented for FY2024 final dividends.

title: ZESCO Tariff Normalisation and Financial Sustainability Plan
description: Directs ZESCO to submit a comprehensive tariff normalisation plan to the Energy Regulation Board (ERB) and develop a 5-year financial sustainability roadmap to achieve cost-reflective tariffs by 2027.
notes: ZESCO submitted tariff application to ERB in February 2025. ERB review in progress. Financial sustainability roadmap approved by ZESCO board.

title: Zambia Railways Turnaround and Capital Injection Conditions
description: Approves IDC bridging facility of ZMW 150 million to Zambia Railways for track rehabilitation and locomotive maintenance, subject to quarterly performance milestones on service reliability, revenue recovery, and governance improvements.
notes: First tranche of ZMW 75 million disbursed February 2025. Q1 2025 milestone review scheduled for April 2025.

title: ZANACO AML/CFT Compliance and NPL Reduction
description: Directs ZANACO to implement a comprehensive KYC remediation programme, strengthen AML/CFT controls, and submit a credible NPL reduction plan to BoZ. IDC to receive quarterly compliance progress reports.
notes: ZANACO has completed Phase 1 KYC remediation. BoZ re-examination passed March 2024. NPL reduction plan submitted to BoZ.

title: Zambia Gold Company — ASM Formalisation and Gold Procurement Targets
description: Sets annual gold procurement targets for Zambia Gold Company from artisanal and small-scale miners, requiring a minimum 20% year-on-year increase in formalised ASM gold volumes through 2026.
notes: FY2024 ASM procurement increased by 18% vs FY2023, slightly below the 20% target. New buying centres opened in North-Western and Muchinga provinces.
